articles.title: Nike, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend on Class A and Class B Common Stock, Payable on July 1, 2026
articles.summary: Nike, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its Class A and Class B Common Stock. The dividend is payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. This announcement was made following a declaration by the company's Board of Directors.
articles.text_to_analyze: Nike, Inc. Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend on Class A and Class B Common Stock, Payable on July 1, 2026. Nike, Inc. has announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.41 per share for its Class A and Class B Common Stock. The dividend is payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. This announcement was made following a declaration by the company's Board of Directors.
